title: PolicyDecision
description: Deterministic admission result. final.md section 12.4. Denied actions cannot be executed; review-required actions cannot execute before approval; decisions are journaled before execution.

matched_rules.description: Ids of the policy rules that fired, in evaluation order.

explanation.description: Human-legible reason for the decision. Denials MUST be explainable (final.md 22.9).

required_review.description: Whether review is required. final.md 12.4 mandates the field but not its type; accepted as a boolean flag, or as a review handle / null (the reference Rust crate uses Option<String>). See contracts/README.md interop table.

required_simulation.description: Whether simulation is required. Boolean flag, or a simulation handle / null (reference crate uses Option<String>). See contracts/README.md interop table.
